subcodes.first_line: O thou confirmed personage! The letter that thou hast written to Aga Seyad Assadollah was read from first to last… Ye should consider the question of goodly character as of the first importance
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شخص موید نامه ایکه باقا سید اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودید از بدایت تا نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer
